title: × hesperotsuga jeffreyi
intro: × Hesperotsuga jeffreyi, also known as Jeffrey's holly, is a hybrid of the holly tree species, native to California. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jeffrey's holly include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
